announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: HDFC Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure under Regulations 30, 42 and 60 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: HDFC Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Composite scheme of amalgamation for the amalgamation of: (i) HDFC Investments Limited and HDFC Holdings Limited, wholly-owned subsidiaries of Housing Development Finance Corporation Limited with and into HDFC Limited; and (ii) HDFC Limited with and into HDFC Bank Limited

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: HDFC Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Composite scheme of amalgamation ( Scheme ) for the amalgamation of: (i) erstwhile HDFC Investments Limited and erstwhile HDFC Holdings Limited, wholly-owned subsidiaries of erstwhile Housing Development Finance Corporation Limited ( HDFC Limited ) with and into erstwhile HDFC Limited; and (ii) erstwhile HDFC Limited with and into HDFC Bank Limited'.

announcements.headline: News Verification
announcements.body: News Verification : The media had reports that  "On buzz of Merger with HDFC Bank JM Financial Stock soars". The Exchange, in order to verify the accuracy or otherwise of the information reported in the media and to inform the market place so that the interest of the investors is safeguarded, had written to the company. HDFC Bank Limited has vide its letter inter-alia stated,"The news is untrue and there are no such negotiations taking place with the Bank in this regard."

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: HDFC Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about Relaxation of Rule 19(2)(b) of the Securities Contracts (Regulation) Rules, 1957 ( SCRR ) for listing of warrants

announcements.headline: News Clarification
announcements.body: The Exchange had sought clarification from HDFC Bank Limited with respect to a news item captioned "HDFC, HDFC Bank merger buzz restarts". The Company has clarified that "The media report as above is incorrect and no such proposal is being considered by the Bank as on date".

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: HDFC Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Report Of The Audit Committee And Independent Directors Of HDFC Bank Limited Certifying Distribution Of Proceeds To Eligible Shareholders Of Fractional Shares In Accordance With The Composite Scheme Of Amalgamation'.

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
